item.title: Eight states ask US judge to temporarily block Nexstar, Tegna merger
item.description: Eight states asked a U.S. judge on вҖӢFriday to issue a вҖҢtemporary restraining order to stop the $3.5 billion merger of вҖӢNexstar Media Group вҖӢand Tegna.

item.title: Global bond rout deepens with concern over war-driven inflation
item.description: Government bond yields in the U.S. and Europe spiked on Friday as investor concern intensified over the inflationary impact of the war-driven global energy shock, with expectations the pressure will not ease вҖӢanytime soon.

item.title: Wall St Week Ahead: Persistent Iran war, energy price surge set to loom over stocks
item.description: A Middle East crisis that has convulsed markets should remain the focal point for Wall Street in the near term, as investors stay glued to developments in Iran and the fallout from surging energy вҖӢprices.

item.title: AI's demand for data could cause tight storage chip supplies, Solidigm executive says
item.description: The same booming AI demand that has caused the chairman of South Korea's SK Group to вҖӢpredict shortages of high-bandwidth memory chips could also cause tight вҖҢsupplies for storage drives, an executive from the South Korean firm's U.S.-based AI subsidiary Solidigm told Reuters this week.

item.title: Markets bet on Fed rate hike as soon as July
item.description: Market pricing for a U.S. Federal Reserve interest-rate hike by September is about 75%, with better-than-even odds of вҖӢa Fed rate hike as early as July.

item.title: Easter egg prices to stay high despite cocoa price crash, report says
item.description: Prices for chocolate вҖҢeggs and bunnies will remain high this Easter in the United States despite the fact that prices for the main raw material used to make вҖӢthem - cocoa beans - have gone sharply down over the вҖӢlast year, a report said on Friday.

item.title: Chubb announces war-risk coverage to support ships through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Insurance giant Chubb said on Friday its maritime insurance facility will now be available to ships transiting the Strait of вҖӢHormuz where traffic has been paralyzed due to the вҖҢU.S.-Israel conflict with Iran.

item.title: Senior housing REIT Janus Living valued at $5.9 billion as shares rise in NYSE debut
item.description: Janus Living's shares rose 17.5% in their New York Stock Exchange вҖӢdebut on Friday, giving the вҖҢU.S. seniors-focused real estate investment trust a valuation of $5.92 billion and marking a notable green вҖӢshoot for the sector.

item.title: Brazil's new finance minister to delay divisive tax plans ahead of election, sources say
item.description: Brazil's new Finance Minister, Dario Durigan, plans to adjust the ministry's communication strategy and postpone вҖӢtax measures, including rules on crypto taxation, as the вҖҢcountry heads into a presidential election this year, two sources familiar with the matter told Reuters.

item.title: From Frank's to Cholula, McCormick's decade of deals sets stage for bold Unilever move
item.description: Spice maker McCormick has built a reputation as a savvy acquirer in вҖҢthe past decade, turning brands like Frank's RedHot and French's mustard into growth drivers that now account for a sizeable chunk of its $6.8 billion in annual sales, analysts say.

item.title: Exclusive: Qatar's energy boss says he had warned of dangers of provoking Iran
item.description: As Qatar reels from an Iranian attack that has hobbled its giant natural gas company, its boss, who doubles as the country's energy minister, вҖӢsays he had warned officials and executives of just such a danger should Iran's own sites be hit.

item.title: Panama Canal to grant uninterrupted ship passage in Mar-Sep planned maintenance
item.description: The Panama Canal вҖӢAuthority said on Friday вҖҢit will grant uninterrupted vessel passage вҖӢduring its 2026 вҖӢplanned maintenance program, which вҒ will take place вҖӢbetween March and вҖӢSeptember, requiring the temporary closure of single transit lanes.

item.title: US House Democrat blasts Commerce's 'highly concerning' $1.6 billion USA Rare Earth deal
item.description: A senior House Democrat accused U.S. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick on Thursday of structuring Washington's $1.58 billion investment into USA Rare Earth вҖӢin a way that gives the government "highly concerning" leverage over the company while boosting Lutnick's family-run investment firm.

item.title: Dubai property sector shows early signs of weakness
item.description: Dubai's property market is beginning to show early signs of weakening nearly three weeks into вҖӢthe U.S.-Israeli war on Iran, with data from analysts showing tanking transaction volumes and some real estate agents pointing to price reductions.

item.title: CBS News to lay off 6% of workforce, source says
item.description: CBS News will lay off about 6% of its workforce, according to a source familiar with the matter, in the latest вҖӢmove under new Editor-In-Chief Bari Weiss to revamp the network and вҖҢboost its ratings to catch up with rivals ABC and NBC.

item.title: US House panel asks Pentagon to review Safran ventures in China
item.description: A top lawmaker asked the Pentagon to review вҖӢFrench aerospace company Safran's joint вҖҢventures in China, saying the U.S. defense contractor's commercial ties with Chinese вҖӢcompanies raise concerns, according to вҖӢa letter seen by Reuters.

item.title: Pinterest CEO calls for ban on social media for youth under 16
item.description: Pinterest вҖҢCEO Bill Ready called on world leaders to ban social media for youth вҖӢunder 16 in a LinkedIn вҖӢpost on Friday.

item.title: Fed's Bowman says new external review of Silicon Valley Bank failure underway
item.description: Federal Reserve Vice Chair for Supervision Michelle вҖӢBowman said Friday that the U.S. central bank вҖҢis taking another look at what went wrong with Silicon Valley Bank three years ago.

item.title: UBS says it has secured US bank licence
item.description: UBS has secured вҖҢa national banking licence in the United States, the Swiss lender said on Friday, underlining its desire to ramp up wealth management in the world's biggest economy.

item.title: US equity fund outflows surge as investors dial down rate cut expectations
item.description: U.S. equity funds witnessed the largest weekly net sales in nearly 2-1/2 months in the вҖӢweek to March 18 as expectations of higher вҖҢoil prices, a hotter-than-expected inflation reading and the Federal Reserve's cautious stance dampened hopes for rate cuts this year.

item.title: Exclusive: US packaging firm Silgan signals interest for Germany's Gerresheimer,В sources say
item.description: U.S. packaging company Silgan Holdings has signalled interest вҖӢin taking over German medical packaging вҖҢmaker Gerresheimer GXIG.DE, according to two sources familiar with the matter.

item.title: Ultra-low-cost airlines made risky bet on fuel-efficient planes
item.description: Ultra-low-cost carriers have some вҖӢof the newest, most fuel-efficient planes in the industry, but if travel demand in the United States falters as a result of вҖҢgrowing macroeconomic uncertainty, paying for the new planes could become a barrier to profit.

item.title: Trian opposes Victory's sweetened rival bid for Janus Henderson
item.description: Trian Fund Management on Friday вҖӢsaid it has serious вҖҢconcerns about Victory Capital's sweetened offer for Janus Henderson that rivals вҖӢits own take-private вҖӢdeal with the asset manager.

item.title: Russia to give itself sweeping powers to ban or restrict foreign AI tools
item.description: Foreign вҖӢAI tools like Claude, ChatGPT and Gemini could be banned or restricted inside Russia вҖҢif they fail to adhere to new rules that would give Moscow sweeping powers to regulate the sector, according to government proposals published online.

item.title: Tesla expects Dutch decision on self-driving technology by April 10
item.description: Tesla Europe expects a decision вҖӢby April 10 вҖҢfrom the Dutch vehicle authority RDW on вҖӢwhether to approve вҖӢFull Self-Driving technology in вҒ the Netherlands, it вҖӢsaid on Friday.

item.title: Fed's Bowman says penciled in three rate cuts for year - Fox Business Network
item.description: Federal Reserve Vice Chair for Supervision вҖӢMichelle Bowman said on Friday sheвҖҷs notably вҖҢmore in the way of interest rate cuts relative to her colleagues.

item.title: Trump releases AI policy to pre-empt state rules
item.description: The White House released a framework on вҖӢartificial intelligence on Friday that aims to ensure вҖҢprotections for children, communities and small businesses as part of a national plan to regulate developments in the field.

item.title: Global equity funds see $20 billion weekly outflows, biggest in three months
item.description: Global equity funds saw the biggest weekly selloff in three months in the week through March 18 as investors cut risk exposure вҖӢahead of major central bank meetings amid concerns over inflation вҖҢand the economic fallout from the U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran.

item.title: Ecolab to acquire AI data center cooling tech firm for $4.75 billion
item.description: Water solutions company вҖҢEcolab said on Friday it has agreed to вҖӢacquire CoolIT Systems, a вҖӢliquid cooling technology provider вҒ for AI data вҖӢcenters, from KKR for $4.75 billion вҖӢin cash.

item.title: ByteDance to sell gaming unit Moonton to Saudi PIF-owned firm
item.description: Chinese tech company ByteDance said on Friday it вҖӢhas agreed to sell Shanghai вҖҢMoonton Technology, the studio behind the popular mobile game Mobile Legends: Bang вҖӢBang, to a Riyadh-based вҖӢgaming firm owned by Saudi Arabia's вҒ Public Investment Fund (PIF).
